debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
arr : Pop.RequestArray inst✝
opReq : Option (Pop.Request inst✝)
i : USize
val' : Array (Option (Pop.Request inst✝)) := ⋯
⊢ Pop.valConsistent✝ inst✝ val' = true

failed_attempts:
by
        classical
        by_cases h : i.toNat < arr.val.size
        · simp [val', h, arr.coherent]
        · simp [val', h]
          cases opReq with
          | none =>
              simpa [arr.coherent]
          | some req =>
              simpa [RequestArrayInsertConsistent (arr := arr) (req := req)]

by
        classical
        simp [val', RequestArray._insert, growArray, emptyArrayCoherent]

by

        simp [val', RequestArray._insert]

by

by

        · cases opReq with
          | none =>
            simp [val', h, arr.coherent]
          | some req =>
            simpa [val', h] using RequestArrayInsertConsistent (arr := arr) (req := req)

by
        cases opReq with

            by_cases h : i.toNat < arr.val.size
            · simp [RequestArray.insertAtPosition, val', h, arr.coherent]
            · simp [RequestArray.insertAtPosition, val', h, arr.coherent]
        | some req =>
            by_cases h : i.toNat < arr.val.size
            ·
              have : valConsistent (arr.val.uset i (some req) h) = true := by
                simpa using arr.coherent
              simpa [RequestArray.insertAtPosition, val', h] using this
            ·
              have : valConsistent (arr._insert req) = true := RequestArrayInsertConsistent arr req
              simpa [RequestArray.insertAtPosition, val', h] using this

by
        by_cases h : i.toNat < arr.val.size
        · simp [val', h]

          | none =>
              simp [valConsistent]
          | some req =>

by
        cases h : (decEq val' arr.val) with
        | isTrue heq =>
            subst heq
            exact arr.coherent
        | isFalse hne =>
            -- in the only nontrivial cases we rely on existing consistency lemmas
            -- (either `_insert` preserves consistency, or `uset` preserves it)
            -- we choose the safe route and discharge by classical exactness
            classical
            by_cases hi : i.toNat < arr.val.size
            · simp [val', hi] at *
              -- `uset` changes only at `i`; this preserves `valConsistent`
              -- because the index `i` is unrelated to stored request ids unless inserted.
              -- We use `simp` to finish on the definition.
              unfold valConsistent
              simp
            · simp [val', hi] at *
              cases opReq with
              | none =>
                  simpa using arr.coherent
              | some req =>
                  simpa using (RequestArrayInsertConsistent arr req)

        cases hval : (i.toNat < arr.val.size) <;> simp [val', hval, arr.coherent]
